scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix Frontend && npm install --prefix Backend
scripts.docker:up: docker compose -f Frontend/docker-compose.yml up --build -d && docker compose -f Backend/docker-compose.yml up --build -d
scripts.docker:down: docker compose -f Frontend/docker-compose.yml down && docker compose -f Backend/docker-compose.yml down
scripts.docker:clean: docker compose -f Frontend/docker-compose.yml down --volumes --remove-orphans && docker compose -f Backend/docker-compose.yml down --volumes --remove-orphans
